content.en:
Ye Tian sat in front of the Stone Tablet of the Origin Ancestral Body of the Reincarnation Haotian Body, and there was no other Origin Ascending Realm here except for him.

"It seems that they all know that they have no hope of passing the assessment of the Reincarnation Haotian Body, the other side of the Origin Ancestral Body Method, so they just give up!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Anyway, he's definitely going to have to give it a try, and he's pretty confident in himself.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's Origin Realm will entered the stone tablet.

Immediately afterward, his will was pulled into the depths of the void inside the stone tablet.

Here, he ushered in his first assessment.

Wow!

A finger appeared in front of Ye Tian.

This finger is condensed by countless origin rules on the other side, and it is full of special mysteries.

"Please use this finger to create a corresponding Supreme Technique on the other side!"

This is only the first assessment, but it is difficult.

You must know that every Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor can only stay here for 10 million primeval eras, if you delay here for too long, and finally run out of time, you won't have time to participate in the assessment of other Origin Ancestor Body Sects on the other side, then it will be a big loss!

Ye Tian didn't have this idea, he immediately began to comprehend.

First of all.

The Origin Rule of the Other Side must be high, and if it is very low, there is no need to create a supreme technique based on this finger.

Other than that.

Although there is no time for the assessment, the Origin Ancestral Mountain has a time limit, so it must be created as soon as possible, and no one knows how many assessments there are and how long it will take to complete all the assessments.

Ye Tian silently comprehended the Origin Rule of the Other Side contained in this finger, and then began to try to create.

Outside.

A replica of Ye Tian's body as an attempt, using his own body to try.

Soon, his attempt failed, and his body was damaged.

However, he didn't care at all and kept trying.

When the replica body can't withstand the damage after many attempts, the replica body is replaced.

In this way, the progress of Ye Tian's research was accelerated many times.

The years passed.

Ye Tian gradually understood the mystery contained in this finger, and had some understanding of the new Supreme Technique on the other side.

About 60,000 years later.

Ye Tian successfully created a supreme technique on the other side.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian performed this supreme technique on the other side in the stone stele.

In an instant, a voice rang out.

"Pass the first level of assessment!"

Hearing this, Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

If you pass the first level of assessment, this represents hope.

Subsequently.

The second level of assessment is coming.

However.

After seeing the second level assessment, Ye Tian frowned deeply.

"This level of assessment is too difficult!"

This second level of assessment was to make Ye Tian comprehend a large number of strange words, but after he read it, he found that he couldn't understand it.

However, the assessment has also improved what kind of text this is.

【Reincarnation Golden Text】

Ye Tian guessed that the reincarnation golden script was a kind of writing created according to the golden script on the other side and the black text on the other side and the origin rules of the other side, which can also be said to be a method.

He counted it, there were a total of 10,000 reincarnation golden texts, and if they were all enlightened, it would take a long time.

"I can only understand them one by one!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Fortunately, his comprehension is very high, and he has a lot of other-level ancestors, so in terms of comprehension, he far surpasses other Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

Soon.

More than a hundred primeval eras passed, and he successfully comprehended the first reincarnation golden script.

However, this is the first time he has participated in the reincarnation golden text, and the efficiency will be very slow.

But in the future, it will definitely get faster and faster.

Sure enough, it only took ninety-eight primeval eras for the second primeval inscription to be successfully comprehended.

After that, the third one took a third one, this time in just ninety primeval years.

It's okay, at this rate, it may not take too long to comprehend it all.

The years passed.

One primeval epoch after another has passed.

After the 160,000 primeval era.

Ye Tian had already successfully comprehended these reincarnation golden texts thoroughly.

At this time, the stele announced that Ye Tian had successfully passed the second level.

Immediately after that, the third level began.

The third level is for Ye Tian to create a technique based on the reincarnation golden text, which is not demanding, as long as he succeeds in creating a technique that is no less than the ancient technique.

This may not seem like a high requirement, but it's actually not low.

After all, he never created, this is the first time.

Next, Ye Tian began to try the creation technique, but he didn't know anything about the use of reincarnation golden texts, and he only comprehended the reincarnation golden texts before, and how to use them with each other was a new system.

But for the sake of the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, he had to try.

Thereupon.

He began to try again and again, scrapping a lot of duplicate bodies, and only then did he succeed in creating a technique of the same level as the art of the other side.

Followed by.

The fourth level was assessed, but this time he was required to use the reincarnation golden text to create a supreme technique on the other side, and this time the difficulty was even greater.

However, Ye Tian is still very confident now.

This time, it took Ye Tian 600,000 primeval epochs to successfully create a technique comparable to the supreme technique of the other side.

Ye Tian originally thought that there was still an assessment, but at this time, countless pieces of information poured into his Origin Realm will.

This information is the inheritance of the body of reincarnation Haotian, and it is deeply engraved in his mind.

"The inheritance has been obtained!"

Ye Tian was extremely excited.

However, this kind of inheritance cannot be spread, so he can only cultivate it himself.

He had no other use for obtaining other Origin Ancestral Body Methods, and he couldn't spread them at all.

Therefore, he did not stay in the Origin Ancestral Mountain, and directly chose to leave.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian came out of the Origin Ancestral Mountain.

......

Wind Tooth Island.

When Ye Tian came back, the Lord of the Wind Tooth was very surprised.

"Lord of Endless, you've only been in the 1,000,000 primeval era, why did you come out??" the Lord of Wind Fang asked suspiciously.

"Lord of Wind Fangs, I have successfully obtained the inheritance of the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

"Congratulations!"

The Lord of the Wind Fangs, they congratulated.

Although it wasn't that they had obtained the Origin Ancestral Body Method on the other side, if Ye Tian had practiced this Origin Ancestor on the Other Side, he would be able to become the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm, and then there would be hope that he would have obtained the Origin Ancestral Body inheritance on the other side for them in the future!

At the very least, it can also make it easier for them to obtain the Origin Ancestral Order!

So, they all sincerely congratulate!

After Ye Tian chatted with them for a while, he began to prepare the materials for cultivating the body of reincarnation Haotian!

After all, if you only get the inheritance, you have to gather all the materials, otherwise you won't be able to cultivate!
